creator: bf1783@googlemail.com
text:
While I'm in favor of cleaning some of this up, unfortunately, the choice of

CPPFLAGS= -I${LOCALBASE}/include

, while appropriate for many ports, will break others.  So if a
default CPPFLAGS is set, ports must be able to override it in port
Makefiles.  (And while we're on the subject of flags, the handling of
LDFLAGS also needs attention, since the many ports that don't respect
LDFLAGS break with the use of stack-protection, link-time
optimization, non-default PREFIXes, etc.)

b.
